title: [ORIGINS] Twilight
description: Adds an Origin that can make Light and Dark themed weapons.
body:
## __Description__
Twilight is a mod that adds an Origin called Equinox with powers themed around Light and Dark. Equinox crafts weapons and brings balance.

For the full capabilities on Equinox, please try it yourself in-game.

## __Powers__ (short version)
<details>
<summary>Active 1</summary>
Lightning jump & dash or parry depending on the time.
</details>
<details>
<summary>Active 2</summary>
Convert Netherite or Blaze Rod into a crafting material for special swords.
</details>
<details>
<summary>Passive 1</summary>
Regeneration and (vanilla) negative effect immunity during day.
</details>
<details>
<summary>Passive 2</summary>
Wither targets on hit and move swifter during night.
</details>
<details>
<summary>Passive 3</summary>
Mining Fatigue and quicker exhaustion when not exposed to the sky.
</details>
